title: Sing to the Lord, a New Song Voicing

verses.text: He has remembered all his mercy, His faithfulness to Israel. Our God was ev’rywhere triumphant; The whole wide world saw him prevail. Let all the gather to adore him And his victorious might proclaim. Now make a joyful noise before him; Let all creation praise his name.

Let all the earth with loud rejoicing Burst into song to praise the Lord! With joyful blasts of horns and trumpets Let him be worshipped and adored. Join in the praise and jubilation, Make music with the harp, and sing! Shout forth your joy in celebration; Come, praise the Lord, the mighty King.

Let seas and oceans roar and thunder. Praise God, all you who dwell on earth. Let Rivers clap their hands rejoicing; Let ev’ry mountain shout with mirth, He comes, he comes to rule the nations, And ev’ry wrong he will redress. The mighty God of our salvation Will judge the world in righteousness.
